text_original: This is the best free replacement after Chai became fully paid
text_zh: 柴全面收费后，这是最好的免费替代品
reply_original: Thank you for your kind rating! We're thrilled to be your go-to choice after Chai's changes. Your support means everything to us—we'll keep improving to make Fantasia even better. If you ever encounter any issues, please reach out to support@fantachat.ai. Enjoy your chats!
reply_zh: 感谢您的五星好评！我们非常高兴能在Chai调整后成为您的首选。您的支持对我们至关重要——我们将持续改进，让Fantasia更臻完美。如遇任何问题，请随时联系support@fantachat.ai。祝您聊天愉快！
